{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Observations of the Unknown Wanderer
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Unknown Wanderer]] wrote a work titled '[[Observations of the Unknown Wanderer]]'.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
